summary: Completed testing of enterprise funnel system upgrade. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Public funnel pages and backward compatibility confirmed. Frontend session management issues prevented complete wizard testing.

ui_bugs.issue: User sessions expire quickly during testing, preventing thorough testing of multi-step workflows

integration_issues.issue: Could not complete full wizard testing due to session timeouts
Could not test AI generation from frontend due to session management

passed_tests: Backward compatibility - old funnels work without enterprise fields
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend session management to allow longer testing sessions. Sessions expire too quickly preventing thorough testing of multi-step workflows like the 7-step funnel wizard and AI generation. Once fixed, rerun testing agent to complete wizard and edit funnel testing.
